title: Behind the Scenes: How We Document Live Events at the St. Augustine Amphitheatre
excerpt: Great event documentation is less about gear and more about preparation, relationship, and accumulated knowledge. Here's what actually goes into producing content for a world-class venue.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Avett Brothers concert at St. Augustine Amphitheatre

content.alt: Audience enjoying event at St. Augustine Amphitheatre
content.caption: We know the Amphitheatre's visual language and how to capture its atmosphere
Finding the quiet moments in loud shows is part of the craft
